promptDescription: - **timelighting** — temporal network visualization (IEEE VIS 2024 / TVCG). Nodes have trajectories: their 2D positions are recomputed for each time slice via an incremental force layout (MultiDynNoS approximation) seeded from the previous slice with inertia, so nodes physically migrate as network structure evolves. A Gaussian lighting kernel then illuminates nodes and edges near the selected time. An animated timeline scrubber lets users watch the network restructure over time. Best for: who interacted with whom, and when — customers, products, employees, territories over time. **Always use lazy SQL.** Column aliases: `source`, `target`, `time` (integer year or YYYYMM), `category` (optional, for color), `value` (optional, default 1). Use EXTRACT(year FROM col)::int or DATE_PART for datetime columns. Aggregate with GROUP BY (source, target, time, category) + COUNT(*) AS value. Spec: { "type":"timelighting", "title":"...", "sql":"SELECT a AS source, b AS target, EXTRACT(year FROM date_col)::int AS time, type AS category, COUNT(*) AS value FROM tbl GROUP BY 1,2,3,4", "timeRange":[startInt, endInt] }. Omit timeRange to auto-detect.
renderScript:
function(wrap,spec){var NS='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';var PAL=['#5470c6','#ee6666','#91cc75','#fac858','#73c0de','#fc8452','#9a60b4','#3ba272','#ea7ccc','#ff9f7f'];function parseT(v){if(v==null)return NaN;if(typeof v==='number')return Math.floor(v);var s=String(v).trim();if(/^\d{4}-\d{2}/.test(s))return parseInt(s.slice(0,4),10);var n=parseInt(s,10);return isNaN(n)?NaN:n;}function mk(tag,attrs,par){var e=document.createElementNS(NS,tag);if(attrs)Object.keys(attrs).forEach(function(k){e.setAttribute(k,attrs[k]);});if(par)par.appendChild(e);return e;}var rawEv=spec.events||[];var evs=[];rawEv.forEach(function(ev){var t=parseT(ev.time!==undefined?ev.time:ev.year);var src=String(ev.source||'');var tgt=String(ev.target||'');if(!src||!tgt||src===tgt||isNaN(t))return;evs.push({source:src,target:tgt,time:t,cat:String(ev.category||''),val:Math.max(0.01,+(ev.value||1))});});if(!evs.length){wrap.innerHTML='
TimeLighting: no valid events — need columns: source, target, time (integer), optionally category, value.
';return;}var nodeById={};var nodeList=[];function getNode(id){if(!nodeById[id]){nodeById[id]={id:id,deg:0,cat:'',catC:{},tHeat:{}};nodeList.push(nodeById[id]);}return nodeById[id];}var edgeList=[];evs.forEach(function(ev){var s=getNode(ev.source),t=getNode(ev.target);s.deg+=ev.val;t.deg+=ev.val;if(ev.cat){s.catC[ev.cat]=(s.catC[ev.cat]||0)+ev.val;t.catC[ev.cat]=(t.catC[ev.cat]||0)+ev.val;}s.tHeat[ev.time]=(s.tHeat[ev.time]||0)+ev.val;t.tHeat[ev.time]=(t.tHeat[ev.time]||0)+ev.val;edgeList.push({sid:ev.source,tid:ev.target,time:ev.time,cat:ev.cat,val:ev.val});});var cats=[];nodeList.forEach(function(nd){var best='',bv=0;Object.keys(nd.catC).forEach(function(c){if(nd.catC[c]>bv){best=c;bv=nd.catC[c];}});nd.cat=best;if(best&&cats.indexOf(best)<0)cats.push(best);});function cCol(c){var i=cats.indexOf(c);return i<0?'#8899aa':PAL[i%PAL.length];}function mobColor(t){var r=Math.round(74+t*181),g=Math.round(53+t*24),b=Math.round(204-t*38);return 'rgb('+r+','+g+','+b+')';}var mobScore={};var maxMob=1;function nColor(nd){return mobColor((mobScore[nd.id]||0)/maxMob);}var MAX_N=60;if(nodeList.length>MAX_N){nodeList.sort(function(a,b){return b.deg-a.deg;});nodeList=nodeList.slice(0,MAX_N);var kept={};nodeList.forEach(function(n){kept[n.id]=1;});edgeList=edgeList.filter(function(e){return kept[e.sid]&&kept[e.tid];});}var W=Math.max(480,(wrap.clientWidth||wrap.offsetWidth||800)-4);var GH=Math.max(300,Math.min(460,Math.round(W*0.55)));var CX=W*0.5,CY=GH*0.5;var maxDeg=Math.max.apply(null,nodeList.map(function(n){return n.deg;}))||1;function nR(nd){return 5+(nd.deg/maxDeg)*11;}var BPAD=50;var IDEAL=Math.min(W,GH)/Math.max(4,Math.sqrt(nodeList.length))*2.8;var tVals=evs.map(function(e){return e.time;});var minT=spec.timeRange?spec.timeRange[0]:Math.min.apply(null,tVals);var maxT=spec.timeRange?spec.timeRange[1]:Math.max.apply(null,tVals);if(minT===maxT){minT-=1;maxT+=1;}var uniqueTimes=[];var tSet={};tVals.forEach(function(tv){if(!tSet[tv]){tSet[tv]=1;uniqueTimes.push(tv);}});uniqueTimes.sort(function(a,b){return a-b;});var MAX_SLICES=30;if(uniqueTimes.length>MAX_SLICES){var sstep=uniqueTimes.length/MAX_SLICES;var sampled=[];for(var ii=0;ii0){nodeList.forEach(function(nd){var sp=startPos[nd.id];if(!sp)return;vel[nd.id].x+=(sp.x-pos[nd.id].x)*inertiaStr*al;vel[nd.id].y+=(sp.y-pos[nd.id].y)*inertiaStr*al;});}nodeList.forEach(function(nd){var p=pos[nd.id],v=vel[nd.id];v.x+=(CX-p.x)*0.03*al;v.y+=(CY-p.y)*0.03*al;v.x*=0.65;v.y*=0.65;p.x=Math.max(BPAD,Math.min(W-BPAD,p.x+v.x));p.y=Math.max(BPAD,Math.min(GH-BPAD,p.y+v.y));});}return pos;}var snapshots=[];var initPos={};nodeList.forEach(function(nd,i){var a=(i/nodeList.length)*2*Math.PI;initPos[nd.id]={x:CX+Math.cos(a)*Math.min(W,GH)*0.28,y:CY+Math.sin(a)*Math.min(W,GH)*0.28};});var allPairs={};var allEdges=[];edgeList.forEach(function(e){var key=[e.sid,e.tid].sort().join('|');if(!allPairs[key]){allPairs[key]=1;allEdges.push(e);}});var firstPos=forceLayout(initPos,allEdges,280,0);uniqueTimes.forEach(function(sliceT,i){var activeEdges=edgeList.filter(function(e){return Math.abs(e.time-sliceT)<=WIN;});if(!activeEdges.length)activeEdges=allEdges;var prevPos=i===0?firstPos:snapshots[i-1].positions;var sliceIters=i===0?0:80;var pos=i===0?firstPos:forceLayout(prevPos,activeEdges,sliceIters,0.4);snapshots.push({time:sliceT,positions:pos});});nodeList.forEach(function(nd){var dd=0;for(var si=1;si=snapshots[snapshots.length-1].time)return snapshots[snapshots.length-1].positions;var lo=0,hi=snapshots.length-1;while(hi-lo>1){var mid=(lo+hi)>>1;if(snapshots[mid].time<=t)lo=mid;else hi=mid;}var sLo=snapshots[lo],sHi=snapshots[hi];var frac=(t-sLo.time)/(sHi.time-sLo.time);var result={};nodeList.forEach(function(nd){var pLo=sLo.positions[nd.id]||{x:CX,y:CY};var pHi=sHi.positions[nd.id]||{x:CX,y:CY};result[nd.id]={x:pLo.x+frac*(pHi.x-pLo.x),y:pLo.y+frac*(pHi.y-pLo.y)};});return result;}var tDiv=document.createElement('div');tDiv.style.cssText='text-align:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text,#333);padding:6px 0 applyZoom(){gVP.setAttribute('transform','translate('+zoom.tx+','+zoom.ty+') scale('+zoom.s+')');}svg.addEventListener('wheel',function(e){e.preventDefault();var f=e.deltaY<0?1.12:0.89;var rect=svg.getBoundingClientRect();var mx=e.clientX-rect.left,my=e.clientY-rect.top;zoom.tx=mx+(zoom.tx-mx)*f;zoom.ty=my+(zoom.ty-my)*f;zoom.s*=f;applyZoom();},{passive:false});var drag={on:false,sx:0,sy:0,stx:0,sty:0};svg.addEventListener('mousedown',function(e){drag.on=true;drag.sx=e.clientX;drag.sy=e.clientY;drag.stx=zoom.tx;drag.sty=zoom.ty;svg.style.cursor='grabbing';e.preventDefault();});svg.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){if(!drag.on)return;zoom.tx=drag.stx+(e.clientX-drag.sx);zoom.ty=drag.sty+(e.clientY-drag.sy);applyZoom();});svg.addEventListener('mouseup',function(){drag.on=false;svg.style.cursor='grab';});svg.addEventListener('mouseleave',function(){drag.on=false;svg.style.cursor='grab';});svg.addEventListener('dblclick',function(){zoom={s:1,tx:0,ty:0};applyZoom();});var ip0=snapshots.length?snapshots[0].positions:{};var glowEls={};nodeList.forEach(function(nd){var p=ip0[nd.id]||{x:CX,y:CY};glowEls[nd.id]=mk('circle',{cx:p.x,cy:p.y,r:nR(nd)*2.2,fill:nColor(nd),opacity:'0'},gGlow);});var edgeSvg=[];edgeList.forEach(function(e){var ps=ip0[e.sid]||{x:CX,y:CY};var pt=ip0[e.tid]||{x:CX,y:CY};var nodeEdgeMap={};nodeList.forEach(function(nd){nodeEdgeMap[nd.id]=[];});edgeSvg.forEach(function(em){if(nodeEdgeMap[em.sid])nodeEdgeMap[em.sid].push(em);if(nodeEdgeMap[em.tid])nodeEdgeMap[em.tid].push(em);});var hoveredNode=null;var trajEls=[];function showTraj(id){trajEls.forEach(function(e){if(e.parentNode)e.parentNode.removeChild(e);});trajEls=[];var pts=snapshots.map(function(sn){return sn.positions[id]||{x:CX,y:CY};});if(pts.length>1){var pd='M'+pts[0].x.toFixed(1)+' '+pts[0].y.toFixed(1);for(var ti=1;ti1){var pd='M'+pts[0].x.toFixed(1)+' '+pts[0].y.toFixed(1);for(var ti=1;ti13?nd.id.slice(0,12)+'…':nd.id;labelSvg[nd.id]=mk('text',{x:p.x,y:p.y+r+10,'text-anchor':'middle','font-size':'8',fill:'rgba(255,255,255,0.35)','pointer-events':'none'},gLabel);labelSvg[nd.id].textContent=lbl;});function light(t){var sig=(maxT-minT)*sigF||1;var h={};nodeList.forEach(function(nd){var v=0;Object.keys(nd.tHeat).forEach(function(yr){var dt=(t-+yr)/sig;v+=nd.tHeat[yr]*Math.exp(-0.5*dt*dt);});h[nd.id]=v;});var mx=0.001;nodeList.forEach(function(nd){if(h[nd.id]>mx)mx=h[nd.id];});var pos=interpPos(t);nodeList.forEach(function(nd){var v=h[nd.id]/mx;var p=pos[nd.id]||{x:CX,y:CY};var r=(nR(nd)*(0.8+v*0.35)).toFixed(1);glowEls[nd.id].setAttribute('cx',p.x.toFixed(1));glowEls[nd.id].setAttribute('cy',p.y.toFixed(1));glowEls[nd.id].setAttribute('opacity',(v*0.85).toFixed(2));nodeSvg[nd.id].setAttribute('cx',p.x.toFixed(1));nodeSvg[nd.id].setAttribute('cy',p.y.toFixed(1));nodeSvg[nd.id].setAttribute('opacity',(0.2+v*0.8).toFixed(2));nodeSvg[nd.id].setAttribute('r',r);labelSvg[nd.id].setAttribute('x',p.x.toFixed(1));labelSvg[nd.id].setAttribute('y',(p.y+nR(nd)+10).toFixed(1));});var sig2=(maxT-minT)*Math.max(sigF,0.05)||1;edgeSvg.forEach(function(em){var ps=pos[em.sid]||{x:CX,y:CY};var pt=pos[em.tid]||{x:CX,y:CY};em.el.setAttribute('x1',ps.x.toFixed(1));em.el.setAttribute('y1',ps.y.toFixed(1));em.el.setAttribute('x2',pt.x.toFixed(1));em.el.setAttribute('y2',pt.y.toFixed(1));var dt=(t-em.time)/sig2;em.tOp=0.04+0.52*Math.exp(-0.5*dt*dt);if(hoveredNode&&(em.sid===hoveredNode||em.tid===hoveredNode)){em.el.setAttribute('opacity',em.tOp.toFixed(2));}});}var ctlDiv=document.createElement('div');ctlDiv.style.cssText='display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;padding:6px 8px 2px;flex-wrap:wrap;';wrap.appendChild(ctlDiv);var playing=false,raf=null;var 8px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--accent,#5470c6);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:4px;flex-shrink:0;';ctlDiv.appendChild(btn);var tLbl=document.createElement('span');tLbl.style.cssText='font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text,#444);min-width:34px;text-align:center;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;';tLbl.textContent=String(Math.round(minT));ctlDiv.appendChild(tLbl);var hCvs=document.createElement('canvas');hCvs.style.cssText='flex:1;min-width:120px;height:52px;cursor:crosshair;border-radius:3px;display:block;';ctlDiv.appendChild(hCvs);var histDrag=false;function drawHist(){var cw=hCvs.offsetWidth||300,ch=hCvs.offsetHeight||52;if(cw<=0)return;hCvs.width=cw;hCvs.height=ch;var ctx=hCvs.getContext('2d');ctx.clearRect(0,0,cw,ch);ctx.fillStyle='#0d1520';ctx.fillRect(0,0,cw,ch);var htimes=[];var htset={};evs.forEach(function(ev){if(!htset[ev.time]){htset[ev.time]=1;htimes.push(ev.time);}});htimes.sort(function(a,b){return a-b;});var hact={};evs.forEach(function(ev){hact[ev.time]=(hact[ev.time]||0)+ev.val;});var maxA=Math.max.apply(null,htimes.map(function(t){return hact[t]||0;}))||1;if(htimes.length>0){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo((htimes[0]-minT)/(maxT-minT)*cw,ch);htimes.forEach(function(t){var x=(t-minT)/(maxT-minT)*cw,y=ch-(hact[t]/maxA)*(ch-8);ctx.lineTo(x,y);});ctx.lineTo((htimes[htimes.length-1]-minT)/(maxT-minT)*cw,ch);ctx.closePath();ctx.fillStyle='rgba(60,100,210,0.45)';ctx.fill();ctx.beginPath();htimes.forEach(function(t,i){var x=(t-minT)/(maxT-minT)*cw,y=ch-(hact[t]/maxA)*(ch-8);if(i===0)ctx.moveTo(x,y);else ctx.lineTo(x,y);});ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(110,155,255,0.7)';ctx.lineWidth=1.5;ctx.stroke();}var curX=(curT-minT)/(maxT-minT)*cw;ctx.strokeStyle='#ffd700';ctx.lineWidth=2;ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(curX,0);ctx.lineTo(curX,ch);ctx.stroke();ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.3)';ctx.font='9px sans-serif';ctx.textAlign='left';ctx.fillText(String(Math.round(minT)),3,ch-3);ctx.textAlign='right';ctx.fillText(String(Math.round(maxT)),cw-3,ch-3);}function setTFromX(x){var cw=hCvs.offsetWidth||300;curT=Math.max(minT,Math.min(maxT,minT+(x/cw)*(maxT-minT)));tLbl.textContent=String(Math.round(curT));light(curT);drawHist();}hCvs.addEventListener('mousedown',function(e){histDrag=true;var r=hCvs.getBoundingClientRect();setTFromX(e.clientX-r.left);});hCvs.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){if(!histDrag)return;var r=hCvs.getBoundingClientRect();setTFromX(e.clientX-r.left);});hCvs.addEventListener('mouseup',function(){histDrag=false;});hCvs.addEventListener('mouseleave',function(){histDrag=false;});var trajectory'));wrap.appendChild(mobLgd);light(curT);requestAnimationFrame(drawHist);sSlider.addEventListener('input',function(){sigF=parseFloat(sSlider.value);light(curT);drawHist();});function if(raf)cancelAnimationFrame(raf);});}
